title: Classes should not be empty
description: Classes should not be emptyAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellclumsyThere is no good excuse for an empty class. If it’s being used simply as a common extension point, it should be replaced with aninterface. If it was stubbed in as a placeholder for future development it should be fleshed-out.
recommendation: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.

checks.message: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.
